children.name: RegisterPatient
children.purpose: Register a new patient in the system
children.behavior: Extract patient details from input, validate uniqueness, store in patients data store, return success or error
postconditions: patient is stored in patients data store

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: check uniqueness and store new patient

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, patient ID, and message

global_vars.description: check uniqueness and store new patient

data_operations.description: check uniqueness and store new patient

constraints.description: Patient data must be valid JSON with required fields

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient is stored successfully and a unique ID is returned

children.name: BookAppointment
children.purpose: Book an appointment for a registered patient
children.behavior: Extract patient ID and appointment details, verify patient exists, check slot availability, store appointment, return success or error
postconditions: appointment is stored in appointments data store

call_inputs.name: appointment_data
call_inputs.description: JSON with patient ID and appointment details

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: check slot availability and store appointment

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, appointment ID, and message

global_vars.description: check slot availability and store appointment

data_operations.description: check slot availability and store appointment

constraints.description: Appointment slot must be available and patient must be registered

acceptance_criteria.description: Appointment is stored successfully and a unique ID is returned

children.name: GetRecords
children.purpose: Retrieve medical records for a patient
children.behavior: Extract patient ID, verify patient exists, fetch records from patients data store, return records or error

call_inputs.name: patient_id
call_inputs.description: Patient ID to retrieve records for

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: verify patient exists and fetch records

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status, records data, and message

global_vars.description: verify patient exists and fetch records

data_operations.description: verify patient exists and fetch records

acceptance_criteria.description: Records are returned successfully without modification

children.name: UpdateProfile
children.behavior: Extract patient ID and updated fields, verify patient exists, update patient data store, return success or error

call_inputs.name: update_data
call_inputs.description: JSON with patient ID and updated fields

internal_leaf_accesses.reason: verify patient exists and update profile

outputs.name: result
outputs.description: JSON with success status and message

global_vars.description: verify patient exists and update profile

data_operations.description: verify patient exists and update profile

constraints.description: Patient must be registered and only allowed fields can be updated

acceptance_criteria.description: Profile is updated successfully without affecting other data

governance_notes: All children are leaf nodes with direct access to data stores. No further decomposition needed. Constraints and acceptance criteria derived from functional requirements and pre/postconditions.

resource_audit.signature_preservation_detail: All signatures remain unchanged from Stage 2, containing only call_inputs parameters.
resource_audit.internal_leaf_mapping_detail: internal_leaf_accesses from Stage 2 are directly mapped to global_vars and data_operations for each child. Each resource and operation appears exactly once per child.
resource_audit.global_vars_data_operations_sync_detail: global_vars and data_operations are fully synchronized: each entry in global_vars has a corresponding entry in data_operations with the same resource and operation type.
resource_audit.coverage_detail: All resources (patients, appointments) used by children are covered. patients is accessed by all children; appointments only by BookAppointment. No resource is missing.
